status: SCHEMA-VALIDATION1 plus mandatory XOBJ-GRAPH1 and JCS-DIGEST1 gates
evaluation_order: strict JSON parse and duplicate-key rejection
schema evaluation for every FullContractInstance constituent
XOBJ cross-object rules in numeric order

fixture_kinds.FullContractInstance: Complete contract instance(s) with real nonzero digests where the contract defines them.
fixture_kinds.DigestProjection: Bounded canonicalization, ordering, graph, path, or aggregate measurement; not a complete schema instance.
fixture_kinds.ShapeOnly: Local schema boundary only; never counted as an application-valid positive.

invariants: Every vector has exactly one fixture_kind.
ShapeOnly is excluded from application-valid positive counts.
Schema-invalid vectors do not proceed to application evaluation.
Every application-invalid vector names exactly one rule_id and one exact error code.
Full positive ActionLog, AuditManifest, AuditRun, AuditPass, CollectorExecution, and ConsentReceipt objects use nonzero contract digests.
